violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Wire rack shelving and utility cart in walk in cooler have build-up of food debris and need cleaning. Upright 2 door freezer in BOH storage area has build-up of food debris and needs cleaning.

Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not stored in a clean, dry manner to protect from contamination. Cambro used to store lids has a build-up of debris and needs cleaning.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floors in walk in cooler and on prep lines need cleaning under equipment and shelving units. Clean along wall junctures.
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
